chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْإِسْلَامَ يُحْقَنُ بِهِ الدَّمُ وَ تُؤَدَّى بِهِ الْأَمَانَةُ وَ أَنَّ الثَّوَابَ عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 14 – Al-Islām, the blood is saved by it, and the entrustments are paid by it, and that the Rewards are based upon the faith

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/123)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/123)
text: الْإِيمَانُ إِقْرَارٌ وَ عَمَلٌ وَ الْإِسْلَامُ إِقْرَارٌ بِلَا عَمَلٍ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Al A’ala, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from one of the two (5th or 6th Imamasws having said: ‘The Emān (faith) is acknowledgement and performing the deed, and Al-Islām is the acknowledgement without performing a deed’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali has narrated from his father from ibn abu ’Umayr from al-‘Ala’ from Muhammad ibn Muslim from one of them (the two Imams) (a.s.) who has said the following: “Faith or belief is to affirm and act accordingly. Islam is just an affirmation.”
